records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch your mouth, Puppy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch your mouth, Puppy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch your mouth, Puppy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are far too many ears listening on that battlefield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are far too many ears listening on that battlefield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are far too many ears listening on that battlefield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-Agnes? Was that...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: A-Agnes? Was that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, a hallucination round. You seemed to be overthinking things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, a hallucination round. You seemed to be overthinking things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, a hallucination round. You seemed to be overthinking things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you clear your head a bit and look at the moon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you clear your head a bit and look at the moon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you clear your head a bit and look at the moon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moon...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moon...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moon...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Krrgh, grrrrrrrrrrr...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Krrgh, grrrrrrrrrrr...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Krrgh, grrrrrrrrrrr...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, has even my armament unleashing reached its limit already...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, has even my armament unleashing reached its limit already...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, has even my armament unleashing reached its limit already...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, Captain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, Captain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, Captain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's exhausted. We need to pull back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's exhausted. We need to pull back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's exhausted. We need to pull back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. If we give up here, there will be no turning back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. If we give up here, there will be no turning back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. If we give up here, there will be no turning back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy, we took the vanguard in this battle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy, we took the vanguard in this battle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy, we took the vanguard in this battle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we fall, everyone else will collapse as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we fall, everyone else will collapse as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we fall, everyone else will collapse as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The estate is quite noisy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The estate is quite noisy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The estate is quite noisy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You won't be able to hear this within frozen time, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You won't be able to hear this within frozen time, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You won't be able to hear this within frozen time, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've held out well, Dame Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've held out well, Dame Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've held out well, Dame Chevalier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As President, I pay my respects to you and all who fought on this battlefield.

records.m_Talk_FRA: As President, I pay my respects to you and all who fought on this battlefield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. bearing Divinity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. bearing Divinity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. bearing Divinity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even within stopped time, its flesh continues to regenerate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even within stopped time, its flesh continues to regenerate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even within stopped time, its flesh continues to regenerate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even I would be unable to subjugate it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Even I would be unable to subjugate it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, proceed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Edel, proceed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Edel, proceed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, with pleasure, our Regina.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, a hallucination round. You seemed to be overthinking things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you clear your head a bit and look at the moon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you clear your head a bit and look at the moon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you clear your head a bit and look at the moon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moon...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moon...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moon...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Krrgh, grrrrrrrrrrr...!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Krrgh, grrrrrrrrrrr...!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Krrgh, grrrrrrrrrrr...!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, has even my armament unleashing reached its limit already...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, has even my armament unleashing reached its limit already...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, has even my armament unleashing reached its limit already...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, Captain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, Captain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, Captain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's exhausted. We need to pull back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's exhausted. We need to pull back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's exhausted. We need to pull back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. If we give up here, there will be no turning back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. If we give up here, there will be no turning back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. If we give up here, there will be no turning back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy, we took the vanguard in this battle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy, we took the vanguard in this battle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy, we took the vanguard in this battle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we fall, everyone else will collapse as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we fall, everyone else will collapse as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we fall, everyone else will collapse as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The estate is quite noisy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The estate is quite noisy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The estate is quite noisy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You won't be able to hear this within frozen time, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You won't be able to hear this within frozen time, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You won't be able to hear this within frozen time, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've held out well, Dame Chevalier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've held out well, Dame Chevalier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've held out well, Dame Chevalier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As President, I pay my respects to you and all who fought on this battlefield.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As President, I pay my respects to you and all who fought on this battlefield.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As President, I pay my respects to you and all who fought on this battlefield.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And yet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And yet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And yet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. bearing Divinity...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. bearing Divinity...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. bearing Divinity...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even within stopped time, its flesh continues to regenerate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even within stopped time, its flesh continues to regenerate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even within stopped time, its flesh continues to regenerate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even I would be unable to subjugate it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even I would be unable to subjugate it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even I would be unable to subjugate it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, proceed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Edel, proceed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Edel, proceed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, with pleasure, our Regina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, with pleasure, our Regina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, with pleasure, our Regina.
